creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Hi Sergey,

I've tried building against external Lua and LuaJIT on my amd64 11.1-RELEASE box, but it fails to locate the solarisfixes.h without my patch. The logfiles without the extra-patches are located here:
LuaJIT - https://pkg.cainites.net/data/freebsd_11x64-system/2018-04-12_09h49m58s/logs/errors/redis-devel-4.0.9.log
Lua - https://pkg.cainites.net/data/freebsd_11x64-system/2018-04-12_09h50m42s/logs/errors/redis-devel-4.0.9.log

Here are the logs for the build with the extra-patches:
LuaJIT - https://pkg.cainites.net/data/latest-per-pkg/redis-devel/4.0.9_1/freebsd_11x64-system.log
Lua - https://pkg.cainites.net/data/freebsd_11x64-system/2018-04-12_09h52m47s/logs/redis-devel-4.0.9.log

I'm using poudriere to buid my ports, but I cannot imagine that's the cause of the needed workaround.

Hope this information helps.

Regards,
Ralf
